references.citation: Black, P., & Wiliam, D. (1998). Inside the Black Box: Raising Standards Through Classroom Assessment. King's College London.
key_claims: 形成性评价显著促进学习
有效反馈是形成性评价的核心

references.citation: Hattie, J., & Timperley, H. (2007). The Power of Feedback. Review of Educational Research, 77(1), 81-112.
key_claims: 反馈是影响学习最重要的因素之一
有效反馈回答三个问题：目标、现状、下一步

references.citation: Wiggins, G. (1998). Educative Assessment: Designing Assessments to Inform and Improve Student Performance. Jossey-Bass.
key_claims: 真实性评价反映真实世界任务
好的评价任务本身就是学习机会

references.citation: Earl, L.M. (2012). Assessment as Learning: Using Classroom Assessment to Maximize Student Learning (2nd ed.). Corwin.
key_claims: 学习性评价让学生成为自己学习的评估者
元认知能力是学习性评价的目标

references.citation: Brookhart, S.M. (2013). How to Create and Use Rubrics for Formative Assessment and Grading. ASCD.
key_claims: 量规使评价标准透明
好的量规描述质量而非数量

references.title: Digital technologies in authentic assessment in higher education: A systematic review
key_claims: 52 项研究系统综述：数字技术在真实评估四步中分布严重失衡
工具集中在「任务设计」步，对「评价判断」「反馈机制」覆盖薄弱
电子作品集、社交媒体、模拟应用为「学生即知识创造者」提供平台
references.notes: SAGE Open 2025 - 52 项研究真实评估系统综述

references.title: Cognitive education and innovative assessment in primary school: Aligning inclusion, learning progressions, and Romania's OECD-PISA challenges
key_claims: 评估应作为「学习过程的支撑机制」而非仅评判结果
提出四维模型：UDL 多模态接入、迭代反馈、学习进度、真实表现任务
作品集、学习日志、概念图、轶事记录共同呈现成长轨迹

references.title: Module 11: Classroom assessment III — Portfolio assessment

key_claims: 作品集不自动等于真实——内容由课程与教学决定

评分者间一致性需要针对作品集的特殊训练
references.notes: NCME 2025 - 作品集评估的心理测量学注意事项

authors: New York State Art Teachers Association
references.title: Portfolio Project 2.0: Authentic assessment in visual arts education
key_claims: 作品集让学生成为自己学习的评估者，培养元认知与自我表达
